raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>. Also purchased insurance for loss, damage, or theft. Never received the truck. Company said it was delivered. When I looked into it the XXXX XXXX sent it to the wrong address. My address-but the town was different. There is a dispute as to whether it is my fault the address was input improperly or theirs. The address they claim to have delivered the truck to does not exist. My conclusion is either the driver kept it, it went back to the XXXX XXXX, or it was put at some random address. 
No picture of delivery was shown ( It was XXXX ) and the address just stated the town. 
I disputed the charge with the XXXX XXXXnothing was done. I then disputed the charge with my credit card company, and they found for the merchant, however, I did not get to include any details about the above facts. I feel that the credit card company did not do the investigation properly without these facts. 

In addition, the XXXX website was not working properly and it took several tries to even get the order in, in the first place.
